node.statement: GENERAL SLICING THEOREM: For Sigma = level set of f with grad-f timelike, T restricted to Sigma has the Jacobian factor from coarea of f-composed-gamma. Proof sketch cites Federer 4.3.2. CHECK: 4.3.2 is about flat chains in Euclidean space. Does the Lorentzian setting require additional justification? Also verify the reverse Cauchy-Schwarz claim for transversality.
